value.title: Student Enrollment — Synergy SIS
value.description: Stores student enrollment records including enrollment dates and status.
value.content: Student Enrollment table in Synergy SIS. Tracks enrollment dates, status and enrollment type. Core table for attendance and state reporting. Domain: Student Information.

value.title: Student Demographics — Synergy SIS
value.description: Contains demographic information per student: date of birth, gender, ethnicity.
value.content: Student Demographics table in Synergy SIS. Demographic attributes: date of birth, gender, race/ethnicity, primary language. Required for FERPA-compliant reporting. Domain: Student Information.

value.title: Daily Attendance — Synergy SIS
value.description: Records daily attendance events per student per school day.
value.content: Daily Attendance table in Synergy SIS. Captures attendance status (present, absent, tardy) per enrolled student per school day. Used by dashboards and state reporting. Domain: Student Information.
